title: Gooey Ramen with Sweet Rhubarb
description: A twist on traditional ramen with sweet rhubarb and gooey sauce. This Japanese-inspired dish is perfect for a cozy night in.
instructions: Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a separate pot, combine the broth, soy sauce, sugar, and shoyu. Bring to a boil and then reduce heat to a simmer.
Add the sliced rhubarb to the pot and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
In a small saucepan, combine the gochujang and 1 tablespoon of water. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce is gooey and syrupy.
To assemble the dish, place cooked noodles in a bowl, then add slices of rhubarb and a spoonful of the gooey sauce.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
